headlines: SREs to AI agents: Prove yourself before you touch production
Sticker shock has execs rethinking this whole AI thing
Lucky 13: SpaceX aims for July 16 Starship flight test
Microsoft emails Windows 10 holdouts: Fine, keep your old PC another year
crew_quote: "Oi, with the way things are going, I’d rather have a curry in a hammock than see what these execs are gonna do with their sticker shock! It’s like waiting for a weather report from a hologram!"
